task_description: Implement four remaining large features from UI/UX audit: (1) Packing staff FCM alert in mobile-staff, (2) Cost price + brand fields on admin product form, (3) Admin sidebar mobile hamburger grouped menu. Note: Reorder button on delivered orders is already implemented in customer-orders-client.tsx.

verification.summary: All 3 features implemented and review issues fixed. Reorder button was already present from prior commit. TypeScript compilation confirmed for web. No test framework exists in this project. Review fixes applied: notifee navigation bridge, stale closure guard, deduplicated FCM routing.
